resources.string: We’ll send you a link to your email
We’ve sent a password recovery link to your email.
This app was built by a single person, so there may still be a few rough edges.
If something feels off or you need help, you can reach me through the profile of\u0020
. Thanks for being here, and I hope you enjoy it.
Couldn’t continue with Google. Please try again.
Couldn’t send the link. Check your email and try again.
Fill in a valid username, email, and password (min. 6 characters).
This is how your friends will find you.
To sign in and recover your account.
Photo and interests to get to know you
This is how you\'ll appear on Moments
When you create your account, you\'ll receive a verification email
Pick 3 to 5. The more you choose, the better we can recommend content.

Moments is a social app for sharing moments, stories, chains, messages, and conversations with Nova. We do not collect unnecessary data or build commercial profiles about you.\n\nWe store or process the minimum information you enter, create, or enable while using the app, together with technical data needed for Moments to work, stay secure, sync content, show ads where applicable, and power Nova.
2. Information you use or generate in Moments

When you create an account or set up your profile, we store data such as email address, username, profile photo, bio, website, interests, badges, online status, and preferences.

When you use the app, we store the content and actions you choose to create: moments, stories, chains, echoes, comments, reactions, saved items, visits, tags, custom lists, best friends, and audience settings.

We also process minimal technical data needed for security, sessions, syncing, notifications, ads, and error resolution.

We use information to provide the service, authenticate you, sync content, deliver messages, apply your privacy settings, personalize the experience, improve Moments, prevent abuse, handle reports, and comply with legal obligations.\n\nLegal bases may include providing the service you request, your consent, our legitimate interest in security and product improvement, and compliance with legal obligations.

Nova may process your messages, images you send to it, account context, preferences, recent activity, and personal memory to respond in a more useful way.

Nova's memory may store details such as what you prefer to be called, interests, conversation style, or information you voluntarily share. You can edit or delete this memory from the app.

Nova works through technical AI providers, such as Firebase Vertex AI/Gemini, and some moderation tasks may use external services. We do not use your Nova conversations to sell data or for third-party personalized advertising.

You control who can see parts of your content through private account settings, audiences, best friends, custom lists, only me, blocks, mutes, and visibility settings for followers, following, and admirers.\n\nPrivate or restricted content uses Blackout: Moments tries to hide it from screenshots and screen recordings using secure system protection. Posts published to everyone do not use this protection. Even so, no measure can fully prevent someone from copying or sharing outside the app content they were able to access.

We process conversations, message requests, participants, timestamps, read receipts, media files, ephemeral messages, and shared content to deliver messaging.\n\nWe apply encryption and security measures to protect messages and sensitive data. However, some metadata, media file URLs, or information needed to deliver the service may be stored and processed separately.

We request permissions only when needed for a specific feature: camera to create photos or videos, photo library to upload or save content, microphone for audio, and location to tag posts, show maps, nearby content, and optional Nova context.\n\nYou can change these permissions in iOS Settings. If you turn them off, some features may no longer be available.

Moments may show ads through Google AdMob. Depending on your region and settings, we may ask for consent through Google\'s privacy form and Apple\'s tracking permission.\n\nIf you agree, ads may be personalized using advertising identifiers and permitted signals. If you do not agree, we may show non-personalized or limited ads. We also use SKAdNetwork and similar technologies for aggregated measurement.

We use user reports, automated review, and security logs to detect spam, abuse, illegal content, prohibited nudity, violence, harassment, impersonation, fraud, and other uses that violate our rules.\n\nComments, images, videos, or audio may be analyzed by automated systems and specialized providers. We may hide content, limit accounts, suspend them, or keep records needed to review appeals and protect the community.

We work with providers such as Firebase/Google Cloud, Firebase Authentication, Firebase Storage, Firebase Vertex AI/Gemini, Google AdMob, Apple, and moderation or infrastructure providers needed to operate Moments.\n\nThese providers may process data in countries other than yours. Where necessary, we use contractual and technical safeguards to protect those transfers.

We keep data while your account is active or while it is needed to provide the service. Content you delete stops being shown, although it may remain for a limited time in backups, caches, logs, or security systems.\n\nStories, ephemeral messages, and temporary content follow their expiration rules. Reports, appeals, security logs, and data needed to comply with legal obligations may be kept for longer.

You may request access, correction, deletion, objection, restriction, portability of your data, and withdrawal of consent where applicable. You can also export data, delete Nova memories, change privacy settings, block users, mute accounts or words, deactivate your account, or request deletion.\n\nIf you are in the European Union or another region with equivalent rights, you may also complain to your data protection authority.

Moments is not directed to children under 13. If we detect that an account belongs to someone below the applicable minimum age, we may limit or delete it. If you are a minor, use Moments with parent or guardian supervision where appropriate.

We may update this policy when our features, providers, or legal requirements change. If a change is important, we will communicate it in the app or through other reasonable means.\n\nFor privacy questions or requests, contact us at soporte@moments.app or visit moments.app/privacy.
Your account is temporarily deactivated but all your data is safe.
Your account has been temporarily suspended
If you believe this suspension is an error, you can submit a formal appeal. Our team will review your case in detail.
Tell us your situation and we will review your case
Explain why you believe the suspension is incorrect...
Your message has been sent successfully. We will review your case and get back to you soon.
